pkgmetadata.longdescription: Pure Python FNV hash implementation.. image httpstravis-ci.orgznerolpy-fnvhash.svgbranchmaster target httpstravis-ci.orgznerolpy-fnvhashPure Python implementation of the FNV_ hash family with 100 test coverage.Take a look at pyhash_ for use cases where performance is more important thanportability... _FNV httpisthe.comchongotechcompfnv.. _pyhash httpspypi.python.orgpypipyhashUsage----- from fnvhash import fnv1a_32 hex(fnv1a_32(bfoo)) 0xa9f37ed7License-------The software is subject to the MIT license.
